# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

class ImageController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    file = params[:file]
    format = params[:format].downcase
    size = params[:size]

    if %w[jpg jpeg png gif].include?(format) && !size.nil?
      output_path = Rails.root.join('public', 'processed', SecureRandom.hex + ".#{format}")
      
      command = [
        'convert',
        file.path,
        "-resize", size,
        output_path
      ]

      system(*command)

      if $?.success?
        render json: { message: "Image processed successfully", url: output_path }
      else
        render json: { error: "Failed to process image" }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      end
    else
      render json: { error: "Invalid format or size specified" }, status: :bad_request
    end
  end
end
